assumptions: No Fly.io account or app exists.

developer_goal: Create a Fly.io account, launch the hellofly demo image, and open the fly.dev URL.

first_success.outcome: hellofly demo is deployed and https://<app>.fly.dev/ loads via fly apps open.
first_success.observable_signal: fly status shows the app; fly apps open loads the demo over HTTPS.

route_selection.surface: Launch hellofly demo app with flyctl
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Launch hellofly demo app with flyctl

candidates.name: Launch hellofly demo app with flyctl
candidates.reason: Official Launch a demo app guide is the hosted first-app path: install flyctl, fly auth signup, fly launch --image flyio/hellofly:latest, then fly apps open. Credit card is prompted for new Pay As You Go accounts.

required_path.action: Install flyctl for the local OS.
Run fly auth signup (or fly auth login) and complete browser signup, including payment details when prompted.
required_path.observable_result: CLI returns to a logged-in shell.

required_path.action: Run fly launch --image flyio/hellofly:latest and accept defaults to deploy.
required_path.observable_result: Deploy finishes with Visit your newly deployed app URL.

required_path.action: Run fly status and fly apps open to confirm the HTTPS demo.
required_path.observable_result: Browser loads the hellofly app at *.fly.dev.

prerequisites.description: Fly.io account via fly auth signup/login.
Credit card for new Pay As You Go accounts when prompted.

uncertainties.question: Are all signup and first-success fields for Fly.io fully enumerated in public docs?
uncertainties.impact: Atomic field counts inside account or billing steps may be incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Live console fields can differ from documentation screenshots.
